text: Ever wondered why one space rock has a tail? Comets and asteroids are remnants from the solar system's birth, but they’re very different. Comets are icy, with frozen gases. When they near the sun? They develop a glowing tail! Asteroids, on the other hand, are rocky and metallic. No ice, no tail. So, next time you gaze at the sky, remember: one’s a frosty wanderer, the other, a rugged remnant. Curious about more space mysteries? Hit that follow button!
